title: selaginella hellwigii
intro: Selaginella hellwigii, also known as Hellwig's spikemoss or Hellwig's spike moss, is a species of evergreen, rhizomatous plant in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is often used in traditional medicine due to its rich source of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which possess various medicinal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella hellwigii include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, including fever, colds, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Selaginella hellwigii are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water, and it can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical treatment for skin conditions.
